title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that despite US dominance in AI chips, models, and applications, China holds a structural advantage in power generation and transmission capacity for data centers. The author attributes this gap to centralized governance enabling rapid UHV transmission deployment versus fragmented US federal-state-local jurisdictions that force hyperscalers into behind-the-meter and off-grid workarounds.
